items.title: Individual mayors have spoken. That has no impact on senatorial and national politics.
items.author: Mark Cuban
items.body_excerpt:
Individual mayors have spoken. That has no impact on senatorial and national politics. 

It's an opportunity for dem leadership to be proud and to set a foundation to counter the inevitable negativity that will come in November.
